content: I have found a possible workaround for removing the ignore from the doctests in the macros crate. we can move the documentation of the macros into the kernel crate, since all items that we want to use are available there, we don't need to ignore the tests. Rustdoc should also render normally. Only the macros crate would not really have documentation, but I don't think that is a bad thing. What do you think?
